---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Desired Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternative Solutions Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case / Benefit
Who would benefit from this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Example
If applicable, provide an example of how this feature would work.

## Additional Context
Any other context or screenshots?

---

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues and discussions for similar requests
- [ ] This aligns with the project's scope and goals
- [ ] I've described the problem and desired solution clearly
